title: Upon Flimsey. Epig.
content:
Why walks Nick Flimsey like a malcontent!
    Is it because his money all is spent?
    No, but because the dingthrift now is poor,
    And knows not where i' th' world to borrow more.
meaning:
"Upon Flimsey. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
